name: Oven-Fried Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose yellow (firm-ripe) bananas. Cut them in half crosswise.
2. Spray a small square nonstick cake pan with cooking spray. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
3. Put the butter in the pan; place it in the hot oven just long enough for the butter to melt.
4. Place the bananas in the pan and tilt the pan so the bananas roll and become lightly coated with butter.
5. Place the pan on the bottom oven shelf and bake only 5 minutes, turning the bananas once until they are just browned.
6. Serve with salt and pepper as a starchy side dish, or sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar substitute as a dessert.
Eight servings, 60 calories each.
